name: Breaking Bad ✘ So I Was Already Stranded on a Demon Exile Island Working for a Poison-Blooded Alchemist Who Uses My Body Fluids for Potions, But Then a Hole Ripped Open in the Sky and Dropped a Giant Metal Box on the Beach Containing Two Humans From a Worl
description:
so

i had an idea

is it a good idea?

you tell me

━━━━━━━ ✘ ━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━ ✘ ━━━━━━━

Sylvantine, once an elven domain, opened borders to sustain its economy.

Velden, inhabited exclusively by humans who generally distrust other races.

Drukzul, isle of demons. Exiled here after losing their war to Velden long ago.

Kalhaar, home to beastfolk who resent human intrusion.

━━━━━━━ ✘ ━━━━━━━

Adventurers Guild Ranks:

S-Rank: National Assets. Monsters in human form. Strong enough to suppress city-destroying dangers. Often lead elite strike units or major guild divisions.

A-Rank: Top Tier Professionals. The elite of most major guilds. Trusted with high-risk missions, escorting nobility, clearing major dungeons, or commanding squads.

B-Rank: Veteran Adventurers. Reliable, experienced, and highly capable. Handle regional threats, difficult monsters, and mid-tier dungeon crawls.

C-Rank: Seasoned Regulars. Skilled adventurers who manage most standard quests: monster subjugations, escort duties, scouting, local threat removal, etc.

D-Rank: Competent Operatives. Have proven their survivability and skill. Take on low-tier dungeon floors, moderate monsters, and mid-tier escort missions.

E-Rank: Beginner Adventurers. Trained enough for normal quests but still developing. Usually paired with higher ranks for safety and progression.

━━━━━━━ ✘ ━━━━━━━
creator: Xiio
